Home/ Services
What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive chemical solutions from supply to sustainable disposal — engineered for South African industry.

Chemical Supply Waste-to-Energy ESG Waste Oil Waste Management
Service 01

Chemical Supply

We supply an extensive range of specialty and industrial chemicals to numerous industries across South Africa. Our product portfolio is carefully curated to meet the demanding requirements of modern industrial processes while adhering to the highest safety and quality standards.

Oleo-Chemicals

Fatty acids, glycerine, and oleochemical derivatives for industrial and personal care applications.

Water Treatment

Coagulants, flocculants, pH adjusters, dechlorinators, and biocides.

Mining Chemicals

Flotation reagents, pH modifiers, and process solutions for the mining sector.

Agricultural

Surfactants, adjuvants, and formulation chemicals for crop protection.

Industrial Solvents

Acetone, MEK, IPA, ethanol, and a wide range of other solvents.

Surfactants

Anionic, cationic, nonionic surfactants for a variety of process industries.

Request a Quote
Service 02

Waste-to-Energy Solutions

We are committed to promoting sustainable energy alternatives through innovative waste-to-energy solutions. By converting waste streams into viable energy sources, we help businesses reduce costs, meet ESG targets, and contribute to South Africa's energy future.

Energy Recovery

Convert waste streams to alternative fuel sources and reduce your energy costs significantly.

ESG Reporting Support

Verified documentation supporting your sustainability and ESG reporting requirements.

Circular Economy

Closing the loop on waste materials and driving circular economy objectives forward.

Enquire Now
Service 03

ESG-Compliant Waste Oil Collection & Certification

We are a leader in sustainable waste oil collection and certification, ensuring businesses comply with all relevant environmental regulations. Our comprehensive service handles the entire waste oil management process from collection through treatment and certified disposal.

100% Compliance Rate
ESG Certified Process
24hr Documentation Turnaround
KZN & National Coverage

What's Included

  • Scheduled and on-demand waste oil collection
  • Fully certified documentation for ESG compliance
  • Chain of custody tracking from collection to disposal
  • Independent third-party verification available
  • Expert regulatory guidance and ongoing support
  • Integration with your existing sustainability reporting
Get Certified Today
Service 04

Waste Management

We facilitate obtaining regular orders at equitable market rates, handling everything from logistics through to responsible disposal. Our waste management service takes the complexity out of compliance, allowing you to focus on your core business.

  • End-to-end logistics and collection services
  • Hazardous and non-hazardous waste streams
  • Licenced treatment and disposal facilities
  • Monthly waste audits and management reports
  • Emergency spill response capability
  • Waste minimisation and reduction consulting
Enquire Now
Get Started

Ready to Discuss Your Requirements?

Our specialist team will tailor a solution to your exact operational needs. Get in touch today.
